article_title: Liquor Primary licences may offer bottle service

briefs.title: Liquor Primary licensees can now offer bottle service — no application needed
briefs.summary: BC Liquor Primary establishments (bars and nightclubs) can now sell a full bottle of spirits as bottle service. The change takes effect automatically — no application required.
briefs.action_required: Review and follow the bottle service rules: control the bottle, respect serving sizes, and set up secure storage for unfinished bottles.
briefs.article_title: Liquor Primary licences may offer bottle service
